title: Skill Audit Report
description: Output contract for skill-auditor. Two passes: Pass 1 wraps heal-skill structural checks; Pass 2 adds 8 NEW content-discipline checks beyond heal-skill.

verdict.description: Aggregate verdict. fails>0 = FAIL; warns>0 = WARN; otherwise PASS.

pass1.description: heal-skill structural results (delegated to bash skills/heal-skill/scripts/heal.sh --check <target>).

code.description: heal.sh finding code (e.g., MISSING_NAME, UNLINKED_REF, DEAD_REF)

autofixable.description: Count of findings heal.sh can auto-fix with --fix

pass2.description: Eight NEW checks beyond heal-skill structural hygiene.

id.description: Stable check identifier. NOTE: 'description-has-triggers' (NOT 'description-multiline') — the broader form accepts AgentOps' single-line description convention plus financial-services' multi-line block-scalar form plus metadata.triggers arrays. See references/skill-template.md §2 for accepted forms.

status.description: n/a applies when the check is conditionally inapplicable (e.g., references-modularization on a <400-line skill).

evidence.description: Specific finding (line, snippet, or grep match) supporting the status.

summary.description: Human-readable one-paragraph rollup. Suitable for embedding in a markdown audit report.
